He notes that while no direct data exists about ADMA post-preterm birth, he uses physiological understanding—that preterm birth correlates with vascular issues including hypertension—as justification for inferring possible future endothelial problems. He then connects this to ADMA because ADMA reduces NO availability—which supports endothelial function—and thus can indicate poor vascular state after prenatal insult.
